states.name: Dargarossa
states.title: Bane of the Ashiran Sea
states.description: Few names inspire as much fear in sailors as "Dargarossa," the most notorious pirate to ever cruise the Ashiran Sea. With his ferocious crew in tow, Dargarossa has plundered countless ships and sunk just as many. His favorite prey are ships carrying high-class passengers, as he has an insatiable appetite for the valuable trinkets they tend to wear. As such, the nobility living along the coast have placed an exuberant reward on his squid-like head. But the local bounty hunters don't dare pursue him, as all those who have tried in the past now rest at the bottom of the sea.
